en: Pet owners should think about the environment such as parks, streets, mountains and rivers, and should not damage it.
ja: ペットの飼い主は、公園、道路、山、川といった環境のことを考え、それを傷つけてはならない。

questions.q: "Pet owners should think about the environment ..." の should と同じ使い方をしている should を含む文はどれか。
questions.a: The train should arrive at Tokyo Station by noon.
questions.b: It is strange that she should know my name.
questions.c: If you should need any help, please call me.
questions.d: You should be careful when you use the Internet.
questions.explanation: 本文の should は「〜すべきだ」という忠告・義務を表し、d の「気をつけるべきだ」と同じ用法。a は「〜するはずだ」という推量、c は「万一〜なら」という仮定の should で、意味がまったく異なる。b は感情を表す文で使われる特別な should なので、これも別物。

questions.q: "the environment such as parks, streets, mountains and rivers" の such as と同じ使い方をしているものを含む文はどれか。
questions.a: She got up early so as to catch the first train.
questions.b: Countries such as France and Italy are famous for their food.
questions.c: His answer was such as I had expected before.
questions.d: As he was very tired, he went to bed early.
questions.explanation: 本文の such as は直前の名詞 the environment の具体例(公園・道路・山・川)を挙げる用法で、b の「フランスやイタリアのような国々」と同じ働き。a の so as to は「〜するために」という目的、d の as は「〜なので」という理由を表す接続詞。c の such as は「予想していたようなもの」という別の用法で、例を並べているわけではない。
